customer_service_complaints: my package says delivered but there is nothing on the porch, nothing by the garage, and nothing with the neighbor. i would love to know where exactly your driver believes this house is located.
i got charged twice for the same order and the chatbot keeps thanking me for my patience like that is a substitute for money. can a person please look at this before i start disputing everything.

the appointment window was between one and five and nobody came. then i got a text saying service completed. completed on what, exactly. the air conditioner is still making the same dying goose sound.

i'm not trying to be difficult but the replacement item you sent is the wrong size, wrong color, and somehow also a different product. i ordered a lamp shade and received what appears to be a pet ramp.
please stop closing the ticket before the issue is fixed. every time i reply the thread starts over with a new person asking for the same three photos like we all got concussed overnight.
the driver left the groceries in direct sun and marked them handed to resident. no resident was involved in this process unless the resident is the ant colony now occupying my ice cream.
i understand shipping delays happen, but your update email said weather issue and it was seventy two and clear here all day. if the weather was inside your warehouse just say that.
the haircut is uneven and i noticed it in the parking lot, which is not ideal because i was on the way to a family event. i do not want a refund argument, i want this fixed.
maintenance came in while i was gone, replaced nothing, and left a note saying no issue found. the sink still leaks and now somehow the cabinet door no longer closes either.
i cancelled before the trial ended and still got billed. if this requires three forms and a live chat to undo, then it was never really a trial, it was just kidnapping with branding.
the food arrived cold, the drink was missing, and somebody stapled the receipt through the top bun. i am not even especially angry anymore, just impressed by the consistency of failure.
i uploaded the return label twice and your portal still says action required. if there is a hidden ritual phrase i need to say to make the website accept a pdf, please advise.
nobody told me the technician would need access to the attic, so now i have a stranger here and twelve boxes to move before he leaves in twenty minutes. this feels like an avoidable surprise.
i was told the warranty covered parts and labor, but now the invoice says diagnostic fee, trip fee, and disposal fee. apparently the only free part of this experience was the disappointment.
the bouquet arrived beautiful on the outside and fully moldy in the middle. that is a really specific kind of insult when the occasion was already sensitive to begin with.
your support number routes me in a circle back to the website and the website tells me to call support. this is not a system, this is a practical joke with hold music.
the installer rescheduled twice and then asked if next weekend worked for me as if i am the one creating the problem. next weekend works for me in the sense that time continues.
i picked curbside because i had the kids in the car and still ended up waiting forty minutes while the app insisted i was next. if next means spiritually, then yes, absolutely.
the order notes specifically said no onions because of an allergy and somehow that became extra onions. i need less confidence and more reading comprehension from this restaurant.
the salon moved my appointment by ninety minutes without asking and then acted confused that i could not stay. i arranged childcare for the original time, not for whatever this was.
the package was marked fragile and arrived looking like somebody practiced punting with it. the item inside is cracked in three places and the box has a footprint on top for flavor.
i reported the billing error last month and was told it would be corrected automatically. this month i got the same charge plus a late fee, which feels ambitious.
the substitute teacher never showed, the class got cancelled, and now i'm being billed for the session anyway. i would like a refund and maybe also an explanation that sounds embarrassed.
i'm trying to reschedule the inspection because nobody gave me the right date until this morning. if there is a fee for your office creating its own confusion, that seems rude.
the pizza tracker said baking for forty eight minutes and then jumped directly to delivered. there was no pizza. i feel like i watched a machine lie to me in real time.
please tell the driver not to lean the package against the storm door. i know this because i have now knocked over two deliveries trying to open my own house.
i was promised a callback within twenty four hours and it has been four days. at this point i don't even need fast, i just need somebody willing to admit time has passed.
the replacement remote works only if i stand six feet away and point it at the ceiling. i'm sure there is a technical explanation, but i was hoping for a television, not a ritual.
i requested fragrance free detergent because the scent gives me a headache and everything came back smelling like a haunted candle aisle. i need this redone or refunded.
the app says my account is locked for security reasons but the reset email never comes. either i have been hacked or your software is committed to a very passive form of bullying.
the estimate online was half what the actual total came to after fees. if the final number requires a surprise reveal at checkout, it is not really an estimate, it is theater.
the movers left one lamp, three books, and an entire rug in the truck and now i am being told lost item claims take up to thirty business days. the rug is not subtle.
i paid for express shipping because this was a birthday gift and now it is arriving after the birthday. please don't offer me points. nobody has ever healed through points.
the doctor office called to confirm an appointment that they themselves cancelled yesterday. i need less outreach and more internal communication over there.
the wrong prescription was sent to the pharmacy again and i am running out of ways to explain that these are not interchangeable just because they begin with the same letter.
your website keeps removing the discount code when i update the cart, which feels less like a bug and more like a personality trait. can you honor the advertised price or not.
i am still waiting on the refund from the class that was cancelled because the instructor quit. respectfully, your internal staffing crisis is not a gift card situation for me.
the carpet cleaner left the room wetter than it started and now it smells like old socks and ambition. if this is normal, normal should be illegal.
the printer arrived with no power cord and the manual keeps referring to items included in the box. i agree that they should have been included. that is my issue.
i selected no contact delivery and the driver rang the bell until the dog lost his mind. then the app asked how smooth the process was. emotionally, not smooth.
the repair person fixed the dryer but somehow disconnected the washing machine drain. i realize these are technically separate appliances, but i was hoping for net progress.
my order came with someone else's invoice inside, including their full address and phone number, which seems bad for them and also not ideal for your workflow.
the charging station listed as available was not functioning and the support line said reboot the app. i do not think the issue is on my phone's side of the parking lot.
the class description said beginner friendly and the instructor spent the first ten minutes asking who had done this before. apparently everybody except me and one confused dad.
the seat i paid extra for no longer exists according to the gate agent. i admire the confidence with which this airline treats reality as an editable suggestion.
the contractor was supposed to bring paint samples and instead brought a ladder and a helper. i need colors selected before demolition enters the conversation.
the order was missing two items and the refund covered only one. i don't know how to explain that two is more than one without sounding like i'm on the verge of a breakdown.
nobody mentioned the annual fee until after i entered my card information. if the number appears only after commitment, that is not transparency, that is ambush pricing.
my dog came back from grooming with one nail still long enough to click on the floor and a bandana that says handsome. i am glad we nailed one of the objectives.
the booking site let me reserve a room that the hotel says has been out of service for a week. i would prefer not to participate in the disagreement between your two systems.
family_logistics: can you pick up from practice tomorrow because the early meeting got moved and i won't make it across town in time unless traffic suddenly becomes a myth.
the permission slip is on the counter under the mail and needs to be signed tonight or he can't go friday. i am saying this now because tomorrow will somehow become impossible.
i switched the dentist appointment to thursday at three fifteen. please don't let anyone eat crackers in the car right before because last time i looked negligent by association.
if you're doing school pickup can you also grab the prescription on the way back. they close at six and i keep forgetting that businesses still act like people are home by then.
the form for camp needs the insurance card number again. i know we have sent it to them before, but apparently paperwork achieves reincarnation when left unsupervised.
she needs black shoes for the concert and of course remembered this at nine thirty at night. if you pass anywhere tomorrow please check, because i refuse to pay rush shipping out of spite.
can someone confirm who is bringing snacks saturday because i have heard chips from one person, oranges from another, and absolutely nothing from the one who started the spreadsheet.
i put the library books in the front seat so nobody forgets them again. if they are still in the car after school i am returning them personally and sending everyone an invoice.
the bus is running late again so if you're near the stop can you wait there. he says he's fine but his version of fine has accepted candy from strangers before.
i moved swim lessons to the later slot because the original one collided with the parent conference and i only realized that after saying yes in two different places.
there are cupcakes in the freezer for friday but do not touch them and definitely do not tell anyone they are there or they will mysteriously become house dessert by tonight.
please remember tomorrow is the day with both early release and the allergy specialist, which is exactly the kind of scheduling combo that ruins a normal person's will to continue.
the backpack in the hallway is for sunday and already has the cleats, water bottle, and change of clothes in it. i am saying this because future confusion has a strong family history.
if the school calls, tell them she was absent for the fever and not because of the trip. i don't need an attendance lecture from someone who has never met this child on a beach day.
can you check whether the science project is still in the trunk. if it melted, broke, or got left at your office overnight we need to start grieving early.
i added the birthday party to the shared calendar but i don't trust the calendar emotionally, so please also write it down somewhere analog like it's 1997.
the sitter can stay until ten but only if someone confirms by five. i am tired of relaying basic facts through three adults like i'm coordinating troop movement.
he needs lunch money in cash because the system is down again and apparently no one in charge considered that children cannot pay with sincere vibes.
if you are already at the store, grab poster board, glue sticks, and whatever people use to make a solar system look educational and not like despair with glitter.
please don't wash the jersey tonight. the coach wants them all turned in tomorrow and wet polyester in a car is not an experience i'm willing to author.
the vaccine form has to be uploaded by noon or they lock the portal and then pretend deadlines are a moral issue instead of a software preference.
can you text the other parents and see who is still carpooling because i have heard yes from two people, a thumbs up from one, and silence from the family i actually need.
there are two different release times this week and the district email explained them in a way that made me feel less informed than before i opened it.
the lunch account is negative again even though i added money sunday. either he is buying everybody cookies or the system is stealing from children for sport.
if grandma is still coming friday somebody needs to move the boxes out of the guest room before we all start pretending the folding chair is part of the plan.
can you take the dog to the vet Saturday because it overlaps with the field trip and apparently all our obligations have unionized against me.
the camp packing list says flashlight, closed toe shoes, and old clothes that can get dirty. that last category is somehow all of them and none of them.
i put the birthday gift in the coat closet so nobody accidentally donates it, opens it, or uses it as wrapping paper structure. all three feel possible here.
the nurse sent him home with a note about new symptoms and i cannot tell if it's concerning or just school language for 'your child is weird again.'
if the piano teacher asks, yes we practiced. by practiced i mean there was sound in the house and nobody cried, which feels like a pass at this level.
she needs to be at the airport by five and i need a clear answer on who is driving because i cannot keep waking up at three a.m. to solve transportation in my head.
the duplicate cleats are not a bonus pair, they are two left shoes from two different children and somehow that is our current inventory reality.
please label the water bottles before tomorrow because every sports field in this county appears to be carpeted in anonymous plastic.
there's a check in the folder for the trip, but do not seal the envelope yet because i still need to write the emergency contact number on the outside.
if you are taking him to urgent care, bring the insurance card and the list of medications because every time i assume the office has that information i get punished.
the teacher wants volunteers for next week's fair and i know better than to mention this casually because casual is how i end up running a booth for four hours.
one of the twins has a library event, the other has braces adjustment, and i have reached the stage of parenting where i need color coded maps to leave the house.
she says the costume is simple but the supply list already includes felt, safety pins, silver paint, and a headband. that is not simple. that is a craft ambush.
can somebody move the booster seat back into my car after practice because i enjoy having the legal ability to transport our own child.
the school app is asking for a password update again and if i get locked out right before grade posting i will be communicating in a non academic tone.
i put the casserole in the fridge for tomorrow but it's not dinner and if anybody serves it tonight i will lose the only point of planning i had left.
he needs quarters for the field trip vending machines because apparently the educational experience includes a gift shop designed by raccoons.
if the weather turns and the game gets moved, please do not assume the text chain will make that clear. half the parents are answering the wrong thread already.
the paperwork for the new doctor is in the diaper bag because that was the only place nobody would file it into a mysterious permanent disappearance.
can you call and see whether they still have the lab results because if i listen to that voicemail menu one more time i'm becoming a different kind of person.
there is an overnight bag by the stairs with pajamas, charger, medicine, and the stuffed animal with one eye. do not swap the animal. that would be noticed immediately.
please tell him his project board cannot ride loose in the back with the soccer gear. i do not want to explain crater damage to a teacher who uses the phrase learning journey.
i know the signup said nut free, but now the follow-up email says no sesame too, which turns snack planning into a minor diplomatic exercise.
the babysitter can do Wednesday but not if the recital goes long, so somebody needs to figure out whether 'estimated end time' means actual end time or school fiction.
i am putting the camp medication forms directly in your hand tonight because every flat surface in this house has already eaten at least one deadline this month.
hobby_obsession: the starter culture isn't dead, it's just cold and dramatic. if you feed it tonight and leave it on the counter it should come back unless the jar smells like straight paint thinner.
i'm telling you the leaf curl is from inconsistent watering, not pests. people always want it to be pests because then at least there's an enemy instead of a habit.
the tank is cycled enough for shrimp but i would not add fish yet unless you enjoy turning a hobby into an obituary with receipts.
those are not scratches, they're tool marks from whoever sharpened it last. which is fixable, but only if you stop pretending the knife block is a decorative concept.
if the stitch count is off by one in row twelve, stop now. every person thinks they'll fudge it later and every person ends up crying over a sleeve in three days.
you absolutely can use the cheaper flour for pizza dough, but then you have to stop acting betrayed when the crust tastes like competent sadness.
the new grip tape looks nice but if you don't actually tighten the trucks this thing is still going to handle like a shopping cart fleeing the scene.
i know the recipe says eight hours, but the collagen does not care about your schedule. if you rush the broth it tastes thin and ashamed.
the bird feeder isn't empty, the squirrels have simply unionized and found a weakness in your mounting strategy.
don't move the sourdough to the fridge yet. it hasn't done enough out there in the world to deserve retirement.
the fermenting smell is normal until it isn't, and unfortunately the line between those two states can only be learned through minor loss.
if the stain lifted that fast, it probably wasn't in the wood to begin with. congratulations on solving a problem mostly made of surface panic.
your squat is fine, your shoes are not. every time you roll forward my soul leaves my body a little and goes to file a complaint.
people keep blaming the lens when the real issue is they don't want to stand still for half a second and admit light has preferences.
you don't need a more expensive grinder, you need to stop treating the timer like a vibes-based suggestion.
that mold line is not going to disappear under primer. i respect optimism, but the miniature will still be in there waiting to embarrass you.
if the starter motor keeps clicking, stop buying accessories and check the battery like a grown person engaged in cause and effect.
the seedlings are leggy because that window is decorative, not because the universe singled you out for plant humiliation.
i know the chart says medium roast, but the beans are clearly telling a darker story. roast level is not a treaty, it's a negotiation.
you can absolutely thrift a better machine than that one if you're patient and willing to recognize the smell of old belt dust on sight.
the lather isn't weak, your water is hard and your brush is new. everybody wants one villain when sometimes the answer is a committee.
that strange note in the hot sauce is just the pepper mash getting louder as it ages. this is either depth or a warning depending on your courage.
if the board keeps warping, stop leaving it in the garage like wood enjoys temperature swings as a personal challenge.
the yeast didn't fail, you drowned it in liquid hot enough to register as revenge. bread remembers.
you are overcomplicating the compost. leaves, scraps, air, patience. every extra system you add is just a future explanation for why it smells like legal trouble.
marketplace_transactions: is this still available and if so can you tell me whether the dimensions listed are actual dimensions or the optimistic kind people invent with a tape measure in bad lighting.
i can pick up tonight after six if the item is exactly as described and not one of those situations where the first sentence says excellent condition and the photos say flood history.
would you take forty if i come today with cash and do not ask any follow-up questions. not trying to lowball, just trying to stay within the budget i lied about at home.
can you hold it until tomorrow morning. i know people always say that and vanish, but i am real and currently arranging access to a vehicle with enough dignity for a bookshelf.
interested in the mower. does it start on first pull or are we talking about a spiritually first pull where a person has to mean it for a while.
what part of town are you in and is porch pickup okay. i don't need your life story, just enough information to decide whether this errand becomes my whole afternoon.
the listing says vintage but the sticker on the bottom says 2017. i'm still interested, i just need to know whether we're doing nostalgia pricing or regular used lamp pricing.
i can trade the small dresser plus twenty for the bike if the tires hold air. if not, i can still trade the dresser but the cash starts feeling fictional.
does the couch come apart at all for transport because my friend said he can help but his truck experience is mostly confidence based.
would you mind sending one photo of the inside shelves. people say smoke free home and then the cabinets open like a casino memory.
i'm on the way but the traffic is stupid, so if someone else offers full price go ahead. i would rather lose the table than arrive to resentment.
can you confirm the tv powers on and stays on. i am trying to avoid another adventure where the seller says works great and the screen immediately begins confessing.
pickup only is fine, but i need to know whether there are stairs, dogs, or extended small talk because i am trying to plan for my weakest traits.
what is the lowest you'll take if i bring exact change and remove it from your property without standing around assessing the human condition.
i'm interested in the patio set but one chair looks shorter than the others in the photo. maybe perspective, maybe history, just checking before i borrow a trailer.
is the crib still available and does it have all the hardware. i cannot do another saturday where the screws become a moral referendum on my preparation.
if the item has already sold, please just say sold. i can handle disappointment. what i cannot handle is continuing a flirtation with a leaf blower that belongs to someone else.
would you be willing to meet in the grocery parking lot instead. not because i'm weird, just because my street is currently blocked by utility work and one very determined truck.
the ad says antique mirror but the frame looks like it was purchased near a scented candle display. no judgment, i just need accurate categories to make peace with the price.
can you tell me if the freezer actually gets cold or just makes the kind of brave noise that suggests ambition without results.
i'll take it for asking price if the measurements are right. i have learned not to improvise around inches when the object is a sectional and the doorway is old.
i can come after work, but if this turns into a bidding war please remove me from the emotional process now and save us both the evening.
does the sewing machine come with the pedal and power cord or are those being treated as optional side quests. the photos imply mystery.
would you consider dropping it off for extra if i'm nearby. i would ask a friend but i have used up my monthly quota of favors involving furniture geometry.
interested in the dresser. are the drawers smooth or do they require the sort of relationship where both parties have to learn each other's moods.
i know you said firm on price, but firm often means emotionally attached and i respect that. just checking whether emotionally attached has a number.
if the bike has been stored outside, that's okay, i just need the honest version and not the version where rust is called character until money changes hands.
can you send a photo with something next to it for scale. every marketplace rug is somehow listed as large and photographed like it might fit in a microwave.
i'm definitely coming, just running late because the ATM ate my card and now i have to arrive as the exact type of person i was trying not to be.
is the mattress from a pet free home. i'm not anti pet, i'm anti discovering the answer through sneezing in a borrowed truck.
if the computer boots but needs a charger, that's still useful information and not a personal failure. just let me know what level of hope we're working with.
would you trade for a nearly new pressure washer plus cash. i realize this sounds like a man trying to convert one mistake into another, but the offer is sincere.
can you leave it on the porch if i send payment first. i know that sounds naive, but i am choosing optimism because coordinating with strangers has been worse.
the listing says no stains but the third photo is very committed to not showing one corner. i would just like to meet that corner before i leave the house.
how heavy is the treadmill really. every seller says heavy and then it turns out to mean either manageable or small scale bridge component.
i'm interested in the aquarium stand, not the tank. just clarifying because i do not need to accidentally come home with sixty gallons of responsibility.
if the lamp is missing the shade, that's fine. if the lamp is missing the wiring and also parts of its personal history, price changes.
would saturday morning work. friday night i become less competent at lifting and more likely to agree to owning a decorative trunk for no reason.
just checking whether the stroller folds normally or requires the exact wrist angle of someone who has suffered with it long enough to learn its secrets.
can you tell me the fabric type on the chair. i'm trying to avoid another purchase that looks washable and turns out to absorb existence.
i can meet halfway if halfway includes a parking lot with enough room to inspect the item without feeling like i'm doing a small crime.
is there any damage that isn't in the photos. not because i expect perfection, just because i prefer the surprise phase of this to occur before cash leaves my hand.
do you have the manual for the bread machine or are we expecting me to bond with it intuitively like pioneers.
i'm still interested but my husband thinks we already have enough ladders, which is both untrue and currently affecting negotiations in this household.
if it needs two people to move, please say that now. i keep trusting listings written by optimists and then learning physics in public.
the table looks great, but can you confirm it's not from a house with a persistent fryer smell. some pieces arrive with a backstory you have to air out for weeks.
can you mark pending until noon. i know that's annoying. i am trying to be the kind of buyer who respects time while also waiting for nap schedule diplomacy to resolve.
what year is the car seat and has it ever been in an accident. i don't need a perfect answer, just one i won't hear again in a courtroom voice inside my head.
if the bookshelf is particle board, that's okay, i just need to know before i lift with confidence that should have been reserved for real wood.
i'm interested in the kayak but your description says like new and the photo says hard living. maybe still worth it, just calibrating.

she needs black shoes for the concert and of course remembered this at nine thirty at night. if you pass anywhere tomorrow please check, because i refuse to pay rush shipping out of spite.
can someone confirm who is bringing snacks saturday because i have heard chips from one person, oranges from another, and absolutely nothing from the one who started the spreadsheet.
i put the library books in the front seat so nobody forgets them again. if they are still in the car after school i am returning them personally and sending everyone an invoice.
the bus is running late again so if you're near the stop can you wait there. he says he's fine but his version of fine has accepted candy from strangers before.
i moved swim lessons to the later slot because the original one collided with the parent conference and i only realized that after saying yes in two different places.
there are cupcakes in the freezer for friday but do not touch them and definitely do not tell anyone they are there or they will mysteriously become house dessert by tonight.
please remember tomorrow is the day with both early release and the allergy specialist, which is exactly the kind of scheduling combo that ruins a normal person's will to continue.
the backpack in the hallway is for sunday and already has the cleats, water bottle, and change of clothes in it. i am saying this because future confusion has a strong family history.
if the school calls, tell them she was absent for the fever and not because of the trip. i don't need an attendance lecture from someone who has never met this child on a beach day.
can you check whether the science project is still in the trunk. if it melted, broke, or got left at your office overnight we need to start grieving early.
i added the birthday party to the shared calendar but i don't trust the calendar emotionally, so please also write it down somewhere analog like it's 1997.
the sitter can stay until ten but only if someone confirms by five. i am tired of relaying basic facts through three adults like i'm coordinating troop movement.
he needs lunch money in cash because the system is down again and apparently no one in charge considered that children cannot pay with sincere vibes.
if you are already at the store, grab poster board, glue sticks, and whatever people use to make a solar system look educational and not like despair with glitter.
please don't wash the jersey tonight. the coach wants them all turned in tomorrow and wet polyester in a car is not an experience i'm willing to author.
the vaccine form has to be uploaded by noon or they lock the portal and then pretend deadlines are a moral issue instead of a software preference.
can you text the other parents and see who is still carpooling because i have heard yes from two people, a thumbs up from one, and silence from the family i actually need.
there are two different release times this week and the district email explained them in a way that made me feel less informed than before i opened it.
the lunch account is negative again even though i added money sunday. either he is buying everybody cookies or the system is stealing from children for sport.
if grandma is still coming friday somebody needs to move the boxes out of the guest room before we all start pretending the folding chair is part of the plan.
can you take the dog to the vet Saturday because it overlaps with the field trip and apparently all our obligations have unionized against me.
the camp packing list says flashlight, closed toe shoes, and old clothes that can get dirty. that last category is somehow all of them and none of them.
i put the birthday gift in the coat closet so nobody accidentally donates it, opens it, or uses it as wrapping paper structure. all three feel possible here.
the nurse sent him home with a note about new symptoms and i cannot tell if it's concerning or just school language for 'your child is weird again.'
if the piano teacher asks, yes we practiced. by practiced i mean there was sound in the house and nobody cried, which feels like a pass at this level.
she needs to be at the airport by five and i need a clear answer on who is driving because i cannot keep waking up at three a.m. to solve transportation in my head.
the duplicate cleats are not a bonus pair, they are two left shoes from two different children and somehow that is our current inventory reality.
please label the water bottles before tomorrow because every sports field in this county appears to be carpeted in anonymous plastic.
there's a check in the folder for the trip, but do not seal the envelope yet because i still need to write the emergency contact number on the outside.
if you are taking him to urgent care, bring the insurance card and the list of medications because every time i assume the office has that information i get punished.
the teacher wants volunteers for next week's fair and i know better than to mention this casually because casual is how i end up running a booth for four hours.
one of the twins has a library event, the other has braces adjustment, and i have reached the stage of parenting where i need color coded maps to leave the house.
she says the costume is simple but the supply list already includes felt, safety pins, silver paint, and a headband. that is not simple. that is a craft ambush.
can somebody move the booster seat back into my car after practice because i enjoy having the legal ability to transport our own child.
the school app is asking for a password update again and if i get locked out right before grade posting i will be communicating in a non academic tone.
i put the casserole in the fridge for tomorrow but it's not dinner and if anybody serves it tonight i will lose the only point of planning i had left.
he needs quarters for the field trip vending machines because apparently the educational experience includes a gift shop designed by raccoons.
if the weather turns and the game gets moved, please do not assume the text chain will make that clear. half the parents are answering the wrong thread already.
the paperwork for the new doctor is in the diaper bag because that was the only place nobody would file it into a mysterious permanent disappearance.
can you call and see whether they still have the lab results because if i listen to that voicemail menu one more time i'm becoming a different kind of person.
there is an overnight bag by the stairs with pajamas, charger, medicine, and the stuffed animal with one eye. do not swap the animal. that would be noticed immediately.
please tell him his project board cannot ride loose in the back with the soccer gear. i do not want to explain crater damage to a teacher who uses the phrase learning journey.
i know the signup said nut free, but now the follow-up email says no sesame too, which turns snack planning into a minor diplomatic exercise.
the babysitter can do Wednesday but not if the recital goes long, so somebody needs to figure out whether 'estimated end time' means actual end time or school fiction.
i am putting the camp medication forms directly in your hand tonight because every flat surface in this house has already eaten at least one deadline this month.
the starter culture isn't dead, it's just cold and dramatic. if you feed it tonight and leave it on the counter it should come back unless the jar smells like straight paint thinner.
i'm telling you the leaf curl is from inconsistent watering, not pests. people always want it to be pests because then at least there's an enemy instead of a habit.
the tank is cycled enough for shrimp but i would not add fish yet unless you enjoy turning a hobby into an obituary with receipts.
those are not scratches, they're tool marks from whoever sharpened it last. which is fixable, but only if you stop pretending the knife block is a decorative concept.
if the stitch count is off by one in row twelve, stop now. every person thinks they'll fudge it later and every person ends up crying over a sleeve in three days.
you absolutely can use the cheaper flour for pizza dough, but then you have to stop acting betrayed when the crust tastes like competent sadness.
the new grip tape looks nice but if you don't actually tighten the trucks this thing is still going to handle like a shopping cart fleeing the scene.
i know the recipe says eight hours, but the collagen does not care about your schedule. if you rush the broth it tastes thin and ashamed.
the bird feeder isn't empty, the squirrels have simply unionized and found a weakness in your mounting strategy.
don't move the sourdough to the fridge yet. it hasn't done enough out there in the world to deserve retirement.
the fermenting smell is normal until it isn't, and unfortunately the line between those two states can only be learned through minor loss.
if the stain lifted that fast, it probably wasn't in the wood to begin with. congratulations on solving a problem mostly made of surface panic.
your squat is fine, your shoes are not. every time you roll forward my soul leaves my body a little and goes to file a complaint.
people keep blaming the lens when the real issue is they don't want to stand still for half a second and admit light has preferences.
you don't need a more expensive grinder, you need to stop treating the timer like a vibes-based suggestion.
that mold line is not going to disappear under primer. i respect optimism, but the miniature will still be in there waiting to embarrass you.
if the starter motor keeps clicking, stop buying accessories and check the battery like a grown person engaged in cause and effect.
the seedlings are leggy because that window is decorative, not because the universe singled you out for plant humiliation.
i know the chart says medium roast, but the beans are clearly telling a darker story. roast level is not a treaty, it's a negotiation.
you can absolutely thrift a better machine than that one if you're patient and willing to recognize the smell of old belt dust on sight.
the lather isn't weak, your water is hard and your brush is new. everybody wants one villain when sometimes the answer is a committee.
that strange note in the hot sauce is just the pepper mash getting louder as it ages. this is either depth or a warning depending on your courage.
if the board keeps warping, stop leaving it in the garage like wood enjoys temperature swings as a personal challenge.
the yeast didn't fail, you drowned it in liquid hot enough to register as revenge. bread remembers.
you are overcomplicating the compost. leaves, scraps, air, patience. every extra system you add is just a future explanation for why it smells like legal trouble.
is this still available and if so can you tell me whether the dimensions listed are actual dimensions or the optimistic kind people invent with a tape measure in bad lighting.
i can pick up tonight after six if the item is exactly as described and not one of those situations where the first sentence says excellent condition and the photos say flood history.
would you take forty if i come today with cash and do not ask any follow-up questions. not trying to lowball, just trying to stay within the budget i lied about at home.
can you hold it until tomorrow morning. i know people always say that and vanish, but i am real and currently arranging access to a vehicle with enough dignity for a bookshelf.
interested in the mower. does it start on first pull or are we talking about a spiritually first pull where a person has to mean it for a while.
what part of town are you in and is porch pickup okay. i don't need your life story, just enough information to decide whether this errand becomes my whole afternoon.
the listing says vintage but the sticker on the bottom says 2017. i'm still interested, i just need to know whether we're doing nostalgia pricing or regular used lamp pricing.
i can trade the small dresser plus twenty for the bike if the tires hold air. if not, i can still trade the dresser but the cash starts feeling fictional.
does the couch come apart at all for transport because my friend said he can help but his truck experience is mostly confidence based.
would you mind sending one photo of the inside shelves. people say smoke free home and then the cabinets open like a casino memory.
i'm on the way but the traffic is stupid, so if someone else offers full price go ahead. i would rather lose the table than arrive to resentment.
can you confirm the tv powers on and stays on. i am trying to avoid another adventure where the seller says works great and the screen immediately begins confessing.
pickup only is fine, but i need to know whether there are stairs, dogs, or extended small talk because i am trying to plan for my weakest traits.
what is the lowest you'll take if i bring exact change and remove it from your property without standing around assessing the human condition.
i'm interested in the patio set but one chair looks shorter than the others in the photo. maybe perspective, maybe history, just checking before i borrow a trailer.
is the crib still available and does it have all the hardware. i cannot do another saturday where the screws become a moral referendum on my preparation.
if the item has already sold, please just say sold. i can handle disappointment. what i cannot handle is continuing a flirtation with a leaf blower that belongs to someone else.
would you be willing to meet in the grocery parking lot instead. not because i'm weird, just because my street is currently blocked by utility work and one very determined truck.
the ad says antique mirror but the frame looks like it was purchased near a scented candle display. no judgment, i just need accurate categories to make peace with the price.
can you tell me if the freezer actually gets cold or just makes the kind of brave noise that suggests ambition without results.
i'll take it for asking price if the measurements are right. i have learned not to improvise around inches when the object is a sectional and the doorway is old.
i can come after work, but if this turns into a bidding war please remove me from the emotional process now and save us both the evening.
does the sewing machine come with the pedal and power cord or are those being treated as optional side quests. the photos imply mystery.
would you consider dropping it off for extra if i'm nearby. i would ask a friend but i have used up my monthly quota of favors involving furniture geometry.
interested in the dresser. are the drawers smooth or do they require the sort of relationship where both parties have to learn each other's moods.
i know you said firm on price, but firm often means emotionally attached and i respect that. just checking whether emotionally attached has a number.
if the bike has been stored outside, that's okay, i just need the honest version and not the version where rust is called character until money changes hands.
can you send a photo with something next to it for scale. every marketplace rug is somehow listed as large and photographed like it might fit in a microwave.
i'm definitely coming, just running late because the ATM ate my card and now i have to arrive as the exact type of person i was trying not to be.
is the mattress from a pet free home. i'm not anti pet, i'm anti discovering the answer through sneezing in a borrowed truck.
if the computer boots but needs a charger, that's still useful information and not a personal failure. just let me know what level of hope we're working with.
would you trade for a nearly new pressure washer plus cash. i realize this sounds like a man trying to convert one mistake into another, but the offer is sincere.
can you leave it on the porch if i send payment first. i know that sounds naive, but i am choosing optimism because coordinating with strangers has been worse.
the listing says no stains but the third photo is very committed to not showing one corner. i would just like to meet that corner before i leave the house.
how heavy is the treadmill really. every seller says heavy and then it turns out to mean either manageable or small scale bridge component.
i'm interested in the aquarium stand, not the tank. just clarifying because i do not need to accidentally come home with sixty gallons of responsibility.
if the lamp is missing the shade, that's fine. if the lamp is missing the wiring and also parts of its personal history, price changes.
would saturday morning work. friday night i become less competent at lifting and more likely to agree to owning a decorative trunk for no reason.
just checking whether the stroller folds normally or requires the exact wrist angle of someone who has suffered with it long enough to learn its secrets.
can you tell me the fabric type on the chair. i'm trying to avoid another purchase that looks washable and turns out to absorb existence.
i can meet halfway if halfway includes a parking lot with enough room to inspect the item without feeling like i'm doing a small crime.
is there any damage that isn't in the photos. not because i expect perfection, just because i prefer the surprise phase of this to occur before cash leaves my hand.
do you have the manual for the bread machine or are we expecting me to bond with it intuitively like pioneers.
i'm still interested but my husband thinks we already have enough ladders, which is both untrue and currently affecting negotiations in this household.
if it needs two people to move, please say that now. i keep trusting listings written by optimists and then learning physics in public.
the table looks great, but can you confirm it's not from a house with a persistent fryer smell. some pieces arrive with a backstory you have to air out for weeks.
can you mark pending until noon. i know that's annoying. i am trying to be the kind of buyer who respects time while also waiting for nap schedule diplomacy to resolve.
what year is the car seat and has it ever been in an accident. i don't need a perfect answer, just one i won't hear again in a courtroom voice inside my head.
if the bookshelf is particle board, that's okay, i just need to know before i lift with confidence that should have been reserved for real wood.
i'm interested in the kayak but your description says like new and the photo says hard living. maybe still worth it, just calibrating.
